name: @borjie/language-packs
description: Universal Language Pack Registry (UNIV-2). Canonical in-memory and database-backed registry of every language pack Mr. Mwikila supports — 30 pack definitions at launch (2 live: en, sw; 28 reserved). Adding a new language = adding a row + a @borjie/language-pack-{code} package; no core change. See Docs/DESIGN/UNIVERSAL_LANGUAGE_PACKS_SPEC.md.
